artifacts.summary: Prioritized audit of NixOS/Home Manager config + docs: stale pre-reorg architecture descriptions in docs/configuration.md, docs/unstable-packages.md, docs/how-to-add-package.md, docs/how-to-add-service.md; a confirmed factual CPU-vendor mislabel (nandi vs hamsa) in root README.md; stale marker-pdf.nix and python312 references in packages/README.md and docs/packages.md; plus lower-priority emoji-convention drift, near-duplicate Ryzen docs, and small dead-comment cleanups in modules/system/{packages,desktop}.nix and home.nix.
